title: grewia sulcata
intro: Grewia sulcata, also known as the rough calyx or rough-leaved grewia, is a tropical plant native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Grewia sulcata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Grewia sulcata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
